page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1ne.6xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 24 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores operating at a base frequency of 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 192.0 GB of RAM, providing a 1:8 vCPU-to-memory ratio with 8.0 GB of memory per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core metrics, such as stress-ng single-core CPU and Geekbench single-core tests, fall into the bottom 25% tier, with single-threaded gzip compression registering in the bottom 10%. However, the 24 dedicated cores deliver average multi-core performance, as demonstrated by average ratings in stress-ng multi-core, PassMark CPU, and Geekbench multi-core benchmarks. Memory bandwidth tests for both cached and uncached reads and writes also perform within the middle 50% range.

Given its high memory density and average multi-core throughput, the ecs.se1ne.6xlarge is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-bound workloads that do not require high single-threaded performance. It is well-suited for in-memory databases and caching layers, as evidenced by its average Redis SET performance of 16.8 million operations per second. Other appropriate workloads include static web serving, multi-threaded software compilation, and medium-scale text or image processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1ne.6xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 24 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY cores running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 192.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high 1:8 vCPU-to-memory ratio of 8.0 GB per core, though it lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. While single-core benchmarks place the instance in the lower performance tiers, its multi-core capabilities and memory bandwidth consistently rank in the average tier. This resource profile makes the instance qualitatively cost-effective for memory-intensive applications. It is highly suited for workloads such as in-memory databases, Redis caching layers, static web serving, and multi-threaded software compilation.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1ne.6xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 24 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 192 GB RAM, and 4 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for memory-intensive database and caching workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and high memory density for memory-bound database and caching workloads.

192.0 GB of RAM providing a 1:8 vCPU-to-memory ratio
4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Average multi-core and memory bandwidth benchmark performance
Optimized for in-memory databases, Redis caching, and web serving
